title: CFTC Chairman Mike Selig announces clear guidance for prediction markets to help exchanges understand CFTC expectations for new contract listings
message_html: CFTC Chairman Mike Selig announces clear guidance for prediction markets to help exchanges understand CFTC expectations for new contract listings ...
snippet: CoinDesk (@CoinDesk): NEW: @CFTC Chairman Mike Selig announces that today the CFTC will release "clear guidance for prediction markets that will help exchanges understand the CFTC's expectations for new contract listings."

title: Wizz Financial and BitGo Team on Cross-Border Stablecoin Payments
